title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 517
raw_text:
To have Valis cut in is to have negentropy cut in. Time as 1:618034 log
(helical spiral) like a snail shell. Thus I (properly) envision time spatially.
Base of cone at center of spiral, so as spiral diminishes, Valis increases.
Then proportionally progressively more and more correction (input) is
required the further the form-permutations get from their generator-source.
***
[10:49] Who is the woman who whispers to me? "There's someone else in my
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
